query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'documentos' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3wxDEv3kxBHyGJz.fa19c0ca9e29 --database NW4am7ZA3rszie9rtuCceh --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'documentos' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
titulo	varchar
descricao	text
categoria	enum
fileUrl	text
fileKey	varchar
confidencial	tinyint
createdAt	timestamp
updatedAt	timestamp
htmlContent	text
